title: Citrusy Fluffy Malaysian Borlotti Beans Stir-fry
description: A monsoon-friendly dish from Malaysia featuring fluffy borlotti beans combined with a citrusy twist for a delightful snack or light meal.
instructions: Rinse and soak borlotti beans overnight. Drain and cook in salted water until tender, about 30 minutes.
In a separate pan, heat sesame oil over medium-high heat. Add garlic cloves and cashews (if using) to the hot oil and stir-fry for a minute or two until aromatic.
Fold in lime juice into cooked borlotti beans with a generous pinch of salt. Gently mix everything together ensuring all beans are evenly coated with citrusy flavors.
For an extra crunch, sprinkle shredded coconut over top before serving.
